source: string - ONE OF: reference_manual, rule_engine, llm_end_to_end

nodes.node_id: string - matches node_id in the node JSON
nodes.node_name: string - matches node_name in the node JSON

equipment_deviations.equipment_ref: string - tag or type/subtype identifying which equipment item in this node

deviations.guide_word: string - e.g. NO, MORE, LESS, REVERSE
causes: string - one cause per array entry
consequences: string - one consequence per array entry
existing_safeguards: string - one safeguard per array entry
recommendations: string - one recommendation per array entry

stream_deviations.stream_name: string - matches stream_name in the node JSON's connections

deviations.guide_word: string - e.g. NO, MORE, LESS, REVERSE
causes: string - one cause per array entry
consequences: string - one consequence per array entry
existing_safeguards: string - one safeguard per array entry
recommendations: string - one recommendation per array entry
